---
title: "Moving 'Sale'"
format: 
  html: 
    lightbox: true
---

::: {layout-ncol=3}

![L-shaped Bar This is a GORGEOUS full bar. Sadly, we are downsizing and can’t fit it.](graphics/Bar.jpg){group="row1"} 

![Desk/Art table - Large table/desk with storage underneath, some dings but can serve lots of purposes.](graphics/ArtTable.jpg){group="row1"} 

![Queen Bed (with Headboard)](graphics/QueenBed.jpg){group="row1"} 

![China Display Cabinet  -in great shape](graphics/China.jpg){group="row1"} 

![Refrigerator (with top freezer)](graphics/Fridge.jpg){group="row1"} 


![Lift Chair/Recliner - TChair plugs in and helps someone with mobility issues stand up. Originally expensive!  No longer needed](graphics/LiftChair.jpg){group="row1"} 

![Antique Sofa (with two matching chairs) Set was a wedding present to Patti’s grandparents in 1918! Amazingly, all three are in great shape and very comfortable!](graphics/Sofa1.jpg){group="row1"}


![Antique Chair 1](graphics/ChairGreen.jpg){group="row1"}

![Antique Chair 2](graphics/ChairRed.jpg){group="row1"}

![King Bed - Only 6 years old with infrequent use - in great shape](graphics/King.jpg){group="row1"} 

![Green Sofa - low profile, very comfortable (matches green recliner)](graphics/GreenSofa.jpg){group="row1"} 

![Green Recliner](graphics/GreenRecliner.jpg){group="row1"} 


:::
